import json
import sqlite3
import smtplib

# Violation: a massive "God Function" that executes an entire ETL pipeline and business workflow in one block
def handle_nightly_job():
    raw_data = open("data.json").read()
    parsed = json.loads(raw_data)
    
    clean_data = []
    for item in parsed:
        if item.get("valid"):
            clean_data.append(item)
            
    conn = sqlite3.connect("db.sqlite")
    for item in clean_data:
        conn.execute("INSERT ...")
        
    server = smtplib.SMTP("localhost")
    server.sendmail("admin", "admin", "Job Done")
